es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http.clave

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder(java.lang.String htmlData,
               java.lang.String formAttrName,
               java.lang.String formAttrValue,
               android.content.Context context)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        htmlData - initial web page from Cl@ve authentication is requested.
        formAttrName - identifier of the Cl@ve request form (e.g., 'id' or 'name' attributes of the form tag).
        formAttrValue - value of the previous identifier attribute.
        context - application context.
